use_cases: Expandable settings panel to reveal recovery keys or sensitive information
Accordion-style FAQ section with smooth expand/collapse animations
Collapsible navigation menu with rotating chevron indicators
Expandable card component for showing additional content on demand
Nested expandable sections for hierarchical data organization
ai_summary: A Base UI collapsible/accordion component that expands and collapses a panel of content triggered by a button. Features smooth height transitions, a rotating chevron icon indicator, and hover/focus states. Built with Tailwind CSS using the data-[panel-open] state for styling the expanded condition. Used for revealing recovery keys, FAQs, settings panels, or any hierarchical content that requires conditional display.
